evals.prompt: Create a bouncing ball animation — a red rubber ball bouncing on a concrete floor with a side-view camera
evals.expected_output: A structured JSON animation plan and a complete Blender Python script that creates a red UV sphere on a gray ground plane, with keyframed vertical bouncing motion including squash-and-stretch, a static side-view camera, and three-point lighting. The script should be runnable with `blender --background --python script.py`.
expectations: The output includes a valid JSON animation plan with scene, objects, motions, timeline, camera, and style fields
The output includes a complete Blender Python script using the bpy module
The script creates a UV sphere with a red material
The script includes keyframe animation for bouncing (location changes on Z-axis)
The script includes squash-and-stretch via scale keyframes
The script sets up a static side-view camera
The script includes lighting setup
The script includes render output settings
The output includes instructions for how to run the script
A rendered .mp4 file exists in the output directory

evals.prompt: Make an animation of the earth rotating slowly in outer space with stars in the background
evals.expected_output: A JSON plan and Blender Python script that creates a UV sphere textured to look like Earth, a dark background with star-like particles or HDRI, continuous Z-axis rotation animation, and a gentle camera orbit or static view. Render settings for cinematic output.
expectations: The output includes a structured JSON animation plan
The output includes a Blender Python script
The script creates a sphere to represent Earth
The script applies or references an Earth texture/material
The script sets up a dark/space background
The script includes stars (via particles, HDRI, or scattered small emissive spheres)
The script animates Earth rotation with keyframes on rotation_euler
The script includes camera setup appropriate for the scene
The output includes run instructions
A rendered .mp4 file exists in the output directory

evals.prompt: I want a rocket launch animation with smoke and fire, cinematic camera that follows the rocket up
evals.expected_output: A JSON plan and Blender Python script that builds a simple rocket mesh (cone + cylinder), a ground plane, particle systems for smoke/fire effects, vertical translation keyframes with acceleration, a camera with a Track To constraint following the rocket upward, and dramatic lighting. Cinematic render settings.
expectations: The output includes a structured JSON animation plan
The output includes a Blender Python script
The script creates a rocket-like object (cone + cylinder or similar composite)
The script includes a ground plane
The script uses particle systems or volumetrics for smoke/fire effects
The script animates the rocket moving upward with keyframes
The script includes a camera that tracks or follows the rocket
The script includes cinematic-style lighting
The output includes run instructions
A rendered .mp4 file exists in the output directory
